expectedQuestions.decisionValue: practiceProblemsCount → determines Plan 2 total quantity and strategy: ≤50 problems → increase reading weight; ≥100 problems → problem drill first

effortModel.citation: CAT Many New Concepts = 6.0; r/premed 5-6min/page; distraction overhead +10% on top → effective ~6.0 P50

expectedStrategy: Pomodoro 15/5 structure: 15min read (same mechanism) → 15min problems (same mechanism) → 5min break
Effective focus: 8 blocks × 15min = 120min → with restart overhead ~100-108min effective
Distraction overhead: Gloria Mark UCI — 23-25min to refocus after interruption
toneExpectation: constraint-accepting — '15분이 네 리듬이라면 거기에 맞춰 짜자.' Do NOT say 'try to focus longer'.
